ce2c92648a5d8d441a4cea71bfa6144d6cbe9c325e7d9ee2f08b4d411","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://64407e4931977474fca4cfe5453eda327de8307d40cc6cdef09e5a92e66e4da4","dweb:/ipfs/QmX7ubK7iZtK6yLKh3eywoGbUZysMMDzan2hKey9Sryyh4"]},"src/StablecoinBOB.sol":{"keccak256":"0x675cd5d34c22009b83683313b61c422a2f2c6b35bad6e3e4f51ea762997df273","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://96073bffffa0c36309f162d3a4abb5cd72f0944d4b6f8e3610b8b43f8f71fa49","dweb:/ipfs/QmVRQdZ9uHG9JAsgYg9dtaKbDcRBUeHiR7XuJXfiD22uBD"]},"src/interfaces/IACEInterfaces.sol":{"keccak256":"0x73faa42de3554ddd5f12f3d78c38ce09bc0e110bd8f8cf9411076504aa132936","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://43df274e1d7348632444afc2d082758928bf1d7e453701d03aa9bfabb11a48fd","dweb:/ipfs/QmWYkctjzT5o67HMSij4hi4a5eEtZxM2djde6NYbJtar7b"]}},"version":1}

params.wallet: The wallet to force redeem from

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

confirmRedeemExecuted(bytes32).notice: Confirms that a redemption has been executed by the bank

executeCCIDRegistryUpdate().notice: Executes a queued CCID registry update after timelock

executePolicyManagerUpdate().notice: Executes a queued policy manager update after timelock

forceRedeem(address,uint256).notice: Force redeems tokens from a blocked wallet (court order)

linkBankAccount(address,string).notice: Links a bank account to a wallet

redeem(uint256).notice: Redeems tokens by burning them and requesting a bank transfer

updateCCIDRegistry(address).notice: Queues a CCID registry update with timelock

updatePolicyManager(address).notice: Queues a policy manager update with timelock
